Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Changelog:
- Changed venue dropdown to include a search bar and a heart button to favourite venues.
- Added Death roll as an option under mini games.
- Renamed rules to game info.
